title: Manaosella platidactyla
intro: Manaosella platidactyla, also known as Copaiba, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Burseraceae. Traditionally, Copaiba has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Copaiba include Copaene, Caryophyllene, and other sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. Copaiba is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support skin health, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation.
